layout_variants.name: 4-Column Clean Slate
layout_variants.description: Visual Design (UI Aesthetics): Traditional 4-column layout, highly structured on a dark Slate background (#0B0F19). The first column contains a vector logo in `[Display Geometric Font]` and a subtle tagline in `[Body Font]`. The next 3 columns contain link categories with column headers in uppercase `[UI Font]`, widely spaced (gap-12). A super thin dotted horizontal line separates the main body and the bottom bar. The bottom section contains copyright and legal links using a clean `[Mono Font]`. Entrance Animation: Step 1: Logo and tagline in column 1 fade in and slide up. Step 2: The next 3 link columns reveal sequentially with a 60ms stagger from left to right. When scrolling back up: The entire footer fades out and slides down slightly towards the bottom screen edge. Link Hover: Text changes to primary color, and a smooth underline slides in from left to right.

layout_variants.name: Neon Violet & Mint Banner (Contrast Display)
layout_variants.description: Visual Design (UI Aesthetics): Inspired by reference image 1. The top section features a deep-rounded corner banner overlapping the previous section boundary, styled in vibrant Mint Green (#00FFA3), containing a large headline in sans-serif `[Heading Font]` and a flat, oval black button 'Talk with an expert' in bold `[UI Font]`. The lower portion is the footer body with a strong Neon Violet background (#5D3CFA). The bottom-left contains a simple text logo 'w.' in `[Display Geometric Font]` along with 3 vertically distributed link menu columns in light `[UI Font]`. The bottom-right features a large CTA headline: the top row is a tiny uppercase monospaced 'GOT A PROJECT IN MIND?' in `[Accent Font]`, and the bottom row is a giant 'Let's talk' in `[Display Serif Font]` with deep contrast between thin and thick strokes, creating a striking contrast against the flat menu on the left. Entrance & Scroll Animation: When scrolling into the viewport, the dotted/dashed separator line draws horizontally from the center to both edges (scaleX: 0 -> 1) over 700ms. The 'Let's talk' text and the link columns fade in and slide up from below. A white circular 'Back to Top' button with an up-pointing arrow at the bottom-left automatically slides up from the screen edge when scrolling past 100vh. Scroll Reverse: All components retract and condense in the direction of the scroll. Back to Top Hover: Triggers a springy bounce feedback, with the up arrow sliding vertically upward.

layout_variants.name: Dual-Tone Sand & Moss List
layout_variants.description: Visual Design (UI Aesthetics): Inspired by reference image 2. The layout splits into two blocks of warm, rustic contrasting colors. The top block in light Sand Cream (#F3EFE0) contains a short career/contact description in clean sans-serif `[Body Font]` and a horizontal table of career opportunities separated by thin warm brown borders. Each row features a title in uppercase `[UI Font]` and a underlined link 'En savoir plus'. The bottom block in deep Earth Moss (#3E4A3F) contains a giant angular logo 'B2R' in `[Display Geometric Font]` and a contact info column 'POUR NOUS JOINDRE' in light `[Mono Font]`. The visual highlight is a light moss ribbon (#C8CDBC) winding as an artistic SVG path on the right side. Entrance & Scroll Animation: The ribbon automatically draws its stroke (stroke-dashoffset: 100% -> 0%) based on scroll position. Scrolling reverse automatically redraws it backward. Career List Row Hover (top block): Divider line glows, row height expands slightly (padding-y increases by 6px), text shifts right by 12px, and 'En savoir plus' draws its sliding underline. B2R Logo Hover: The logo edges warp slightly using a displacement warp filter, creating a raw, architectural feel.

layout_variants.name: Cosmic Globe with Glassmorphism Offices
layout_variants.description: Visual Design (UI Aesthetics): Inspired by reference image 3. Deep space theme with a dark background (#0B0D19). The top of the footer displays a neon blue glowing 3D globe rotating slowly. Overlaying the globe are glassmorphism office location cards (United States, Australia, Singapore...) with backdrop-blur-md and a subtle glowing border. The bottom section contains 4 thin link menu columns in `[UI Font]`, a muted monochrome partner logo strip next to a 5-star rating widget. At the absolute bottom is a giant, faded 'designmonks' logo in a thick `[Heading Font]`, glowing with a soft neon mint green. Entrance & Scroll Animation: The globe moves up with a 0.2 parallax effect during page scroll, and office cards float freely with out-of-phase frequencies to create a 3D levitating feel. Partner logos fade in and slide up sequentially. Scroll Reverse: The globe sinks, and office cards scale down and fade out. Partner Logo Hover: Logo transitions from monochrome to its original colors, rising slightly with a soft glow behind it.

layout_variants.name: Klarheit Deep Grid & Giant Serif Text
layout_variants.description: Visual Design (UI Aesthetics): Inspired by reference image 4. Dark blue gradient background shifting to black, covered with a subtle glowing dot grid pattern. Left side has 2 link menu columns in clean sans-serif `[UI Font]`. Right side features a large CTA headline 'Let's build something great together' in elegant classic `[Accent Serif Font]`, along with a flat white oval button 'Get a Quote'. Near the absolute bottom, a giant brand wordmark 'Klarheit' (font-size: 20vw) in a heavy `[Heading Serif Font]` is set half-buried below the screen bottom, blending into the dark background with an overlay mix-blend-mode. Entrance & Scroll Animation: When scrolling to the absolute bottom, the giant wordmark 'Klarheit' slides up from the bottom edge and brightens with a gradient. Scroll Reverse: The wordmark retreats down. Mouse Movement: The dot grid background deforms slightly away from the cursor (interactive mouse displacement grid). Get a Quote Hover: Button exerts a magnetic pull, and a small 45-degree arrow slides out from the text center.

layout_variants.name: OMOSA Bold Minimalist & Typographic Stretch
layout_variants.description: Visual Design (UI Aesthetics): Inspired by reference image 5. High-contrast, absolute minimalist solid black theme (#000000). The left side contains a compact sub-banner 'Keep scrolling to learn more / Works next page' in light `[Mono Font]`, a text block 'We would love to hear from you. Let's work - together.' in neat sans-serif `[Body Font]`, and a solid white rectangular button with black text 'CONTACT US ->'. At the bottom-left is a giant brand wordmark 'OMOSA' in bold, sharp uppercase `[Display Geometric Font]`. The right side contains 2 menu columns (INDEX, SOCIALS) and a BUSINESS INQUIRIES contact column. Bottom links (SITEMAP, TERMS OF USE) are in small uppercase `[Mono Font]`. Entrance & Scroll Animation: The giant 'OMOSA' text at the bottom dynamically expands its letter-spacing and stretches horizontally based on the scroll progress (Scroll-driven typography stretch). The call-to-action text block splits into single lines that automatically flip rotate (rotateX: 90deg -> 0deg) smoothly on scroll. Scroll Reverse: Lines flip backward, and OMOSA characters condense tightly together.

standard_fade_slide.intent: Standard entrance effect for the footer: Fade-in with a subtle vertical slide.

staggered_column_reveal.intent: Footer link columns reveal sequentially, creating visual rhythm.

giant_text_split_reveal.intent: When scrolling to the bottom, characters of the giant brand wordmark slide up from below (y: 100% -> 0%) sequentially.

list_row_reveal.intent: Career/contact rows in the upper footer slide up smoothly in sequence.

ribbon_draw_reveal.intent: Draws the artistic curved SVG ribbon smoothly according to the scroll position.

fixed_reveal_footer.intent: Fixed footer reveal mechanism (Reveal Footer) where the section above slides up to uncover the footer.

floating_banner_parallax.intent: Floating banner at the boundary slides vertically slower than the scroll rate, creating depth.

earth_3d_parallax.intent: 3D Globe slides with a light vertical parallax, and glassmorphic office boxes float.

omosa_letter_stretch.intent: Stretches the letter-spacing and width of the giant wordmark 'OMOSA' based on the scroll position at the bottom.

link_underline_draw.intent: On link hover: text changes to primary color, and an underline draws from left to right.

button_magnetic_bounce.intent: Button magnetically attracts to the cursor and bounces slightly when hovered.

social_hover_magnetic.intent: Social media icon scales to 1.15x and transitions to its native brand color with a subtle magnetic effect.

card_glow_interactive.intent: Hovering on glassmorphic location cards: card borders glow brighter and rise slightly.

dot_grid_displacement.intent: Moving the mouse over the footer causes the background dot grid to deform away from the cursor.

logo_displacement_warp.intent: Hovering on raw vector logo: logo warps dynamically using a displacement map.

mesh_globe_loop.intent: 3D globe rotates slowly on the Y-axis indefinitely using CSS keyframes.

bottom_text_neon_pulse.intent: Giant wordmark at the bottom glows with a soft, slow neon breathing pulse.

in.description: Footer is placed immediately after the CTA banner or final sections. Typically uses a seamless background color transition or a floating boundary banner overlap.

out.description: Footer is placed at the final position, serving as the terminal point of the user experience journey.

flow.notes: Must always be positioned at the absolute end of the entire website.
